brief: Iran attacks ships in the Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing US strikes, while new UK PM Andy Burnham cuts VAT on electricity and appoints John Healey as chancellor. Elsewhere, floods hit Afghanistan, protests erupt in Italy and India, and the Houthis threaten another strait blockade.
news_summary: Iran claims attacks on oil tanker and other ships in Strait of Hormuz as US strikes continue. UK PM Burnham cuts VAT on electricity, appoints Healey as chancellor; defence stocks rise. Also: Afghanistan floods, Italy and India protests, Houthi blockade threat.

en.brief: Iran attacks ships in the Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing US strikes, while new UK PM Andy Burnham cuts VAT on electricity and appoints John Healey as chancellor. Elsewhere, floods hit Afghanistan, protests erupt in Italy and India, and the Houthis threaten another strait blockade.
en.news_summary: Iran claims attacks on oil tanker and other ships in Strait of Hormuz as US strikes continue. UK PM Burnham cuts VAT on electricity, appoints Healey as chancellor; defence stocks rise. Also: Afghanistan floods, Italy and India protests, Houthi blockade threat.

zh.brief: 今日焦點包括廈門翔安機場引發台海緊張、英國首相貝安德上任即宣布減稅、以及伊朗與美國在荷姆茲海峽的衝突升溫。
zh.news_summary: 中國在距離金門僅三公里的廈門興建機場，台灣憂心軍事與飛安威脅；英國新首相貝安德削減電費增值稅以應對生活成本危機；伊朗革命衛隊攻擊荷姆茲海峽船隻，美國則發動新一輪空襲。

todays_image.caption: Lobophora sp. algae can blanket the Strait of Hormuz's waters, echoing the way Iran's attacks disrupt the vital shipping lane.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
